title: humboltia marginata
intro: Humboldtia marginata, also known as the "Tiger's Eye," is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Humboldtia marginata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
